ask_prompt: Dakhligeyga bishii waa {revenue}, faa'iidada saafiga ah {netProfit}. Canshuurta la qiyaasay ee la keydiyo waa {setAside} ({pct}% dakhliga). Ma keydinayaa wax ku filan? Waa maxay hagaajinnada canshuur ee la heli karo {smbLabel}s?
tip_pension_desc: Wax-ku-biirinta {pension} waxay yaraysaa dakhliga la canshuuro. Ilaa {pct}% faa'iidada ayaa badanaa laga jari karaa.
tip_capital_desc: Qalabka, kombiyuutarrada, iyo gawaadhida loo iibsaday isticmaalka ganacsiga ayaa yarayn kara faa'iidada la canshuuro iyagoo maraya ogolaanshaha raasumaalka.
tip_input_credits_desc: Hubi in dhammaan iibsiga ganacsiga ay leeyihiin rasiidyo {name} sax ah. SMB badan ayaa seega 2-5% deynta gelinta {name} ee la dalban karo.
tip_opt_income_desc: Iyadoo faa'iidada saafiga ah tahay {margin}%, canshuurta dakhliga caadiga ah ee faa'iidada ayaa laga yaabaa inay ka hooseyso canshuurta wareegga {rate}%.
tip_timing_title: Waqtiga Kharashaadka ka hor Dhammaadka Sanadka
tip_timing_desc: Soo hor marinta iibsiga la qorsheeyay (kayd, qalab, suuqgeyn) xilliga hadda waxay yaraysaa biilka canshuurta sanadkan.
